## ✨ Features

- **Hosted transcription with your Parley account (cloud edition).** Sign in and pick the new **Parley** option as your transcriber — live speech-to-text with no API key, metered against your account's monthly allowance, right next to the bring-your-own-key providers. Bring-your-own-key transcription still works exactly as before.

## 🐛 Fixes

- **Parley model provider shows its own logo** instead of the upstream backend's.
- **Clearer transcription failures.** If a meeting can't start transcribing (e.g. a hosted quota or sign-in issue, or a bad key), Parley now stops and tells you why instead of sitting silently in "recording".
